title: Lab Safety Contract
description: Read the lab safety guidelines and sign the safety contract acknowledging that you understand proper handling of chemicals, use of personal protective equipment, and emergency procedures. Upload the signed contract as a PDF.

title: Lab Notebook Template
description: Download the lab notebook template from the Files tab and complete the header section with your name, course, and experiment title. Submit a screenshot or PDF of your completed template to show you are ready for formal experiment documentation.

title: Measurement and Significant Figures Quiz
description: Complete the short quiz on scientific notation, unit conversion, and significant figures. Covers accuracy vs. precision and how to report measurements correctly in lab write-ups.

title: First Experiment Write-up
description: After completing the introductory density experiment in lab, write a formal lab report using the notebook template. Include purpose, procedure, data table, calculations, and conclusion. Focus on clear presentation of measurements and proper use of units.

title: Acids and Bases Worksheet
description: Complete practice problems on pH, pOH, and identifying acids vs bases in common lab substances.

title: Titration Lab Quiz
description: Short quiz covering titration setup, indicator choice, and endpoint identification.

title: Lab Reflection Journal
description: Write a one-page reflection on your most recent lab including what worked and what to improve.

title: Data Analysis Exercise
description: Analyze class experiment data and submit charts with a short interpretation.

title: Stoichiometry Problem Set
description: Solve stoichiometry word problems and show all balancing and unit conversion steps.

title: Unit Review Checkpoint
description: Checkpoint assessment covering safety, measurements, acids-bases, and stoichiometry basics.
